title: Rockwell Automation Plex ERP Structure
description: Hierarchical structure documentation for Plex Smart Manufacturing Platform ERP data entities.

CustomerOrder.description: A customer order in the Plex ERP system

fields.status: enum - New | Confirmed | In Production | Shipped | Delivered | Cancelled

children.orderLines: array of OrderLine - Individual part quantities

OrderLine.description: A line item within a customer order

CustomerShipment.description: A shipping record for goods dispatched to a customer

fields.shipDate: datetime - Actual ship date and time

children.shipmentLines: array of ShipmentLine - Parts included in this shipment

ProductionOrder.description: A manufacturing work order in Plex MES

fields.status: enum - Planned | Released | In Progress | Completed | Closed
